verified: fresh migrations create exactly six Content-owned tables
article and event use unrelated typed schemas
typed values remain in Storage rather than Content tables
draft update and restore append immutable revisions
publication public projection and Search projection agree
Dataview is Access-scoped, bounded to 100 rows and owns no canonical records
unpublish removes public visibility and records a newer Search tombstone
fresh OS-process composition observes persisted Content, Storage, Search and Access state
empty rollback and reapply are reproducible
two independent connections produce one CAS winner from one expected head
Search, Storage and Audit participant failure paths roll back canonical mutations
negative_regressions: tampered but rehashed Storage public value
duplicate Access or Content denial emission

aggregate_receipt.suite: full exact-vendor suite including opted-in real MySQL
